reviews.review_text: Friendly staff and service

Aangename eigenaars, vlot inchecken ondanks het te laat toekomen
Mooie vernieuwde cabine, volledig uitgerust

We stayed in a superior cabin for 3 nights.

Whilst the cabin was nice we had the road being dug directly across from us for 2 days and one morning with Jack hammers, drills and cement truck. On two mornings they started as early as 7.30am.

Whilst the caravan pk apologized for the noise, after we left, saying the works were unavoidable, they were aware when we checked in of the road being dug  up and there was plenty of superior cabins available away from the works and they did not tell us of the road being dug and offer us a different cabin.

The caravan pk won't take responsibility that we should have been made aware of the works and offered another cabin.
Great spot! Walking distance to beach, heated swimming pool, good clean amenities, friendly check in. Those with children - play ground back of park.

Recently stayed here in a superior cabin. Was excellent, good size, very clean, great amenities. The only thing I could fault was climbing the three steps. Im disabled but I don't necessarily need a disabled cabin but on these cabins there was no hand rail which would have helped a lot. I did see that many of the other cabins had single handrails or ine each side. Or even a bar attached to the cabin would have been nice. Certainly hasn't put us off staying again.

Amazing location. I loved getting up in the mornings to run or walk along Long beach as my exercise sure beats the gym. The facilities were fantastic the pool, games room and playground. My 2 year old couldn't stop talking about the playground. They also had a breakfast and a Burger night for rural aid that was so lovely and the food was delicious. The staff are so friendly and helpful. Nothing is too hard for them.. the front door and light didn't work for our cabin and the came and fixed it straight away. The cabin was extremely tidy and in fantastic condition. We loved it and we will be back.
Great place but was a bit windy when we were there

We recently stayed at this caravan park with our family of four, along with friends, and it was easily the worst experience we’ve had in over a year of travelling around Australia.

We had booked months in advance and specifically arranged for our cabins to be next to each other. When we arrived at 2pm (check-in time), none of the cabins were ready. We were understanding and happy to wait—but the way we were treated by the manager was completely unacceptable. She was incredibly rude and acted as if we were inconveniencing her just by showing up on time.

Once the cabins were finally ready, things only got worse. One of the cabins had a strong, overwhelming mould smell that made us feel sick, and another had a completely blocked toilet. Travelling with kids, this is just not acceptable.

We went to the office to raise these issues, expecting at least some effort to fix the problems. Instead, the woman who claimed to be the owner/manager dismissed us and told us that if we didn’t like it, we could leave. No apology, no attempt to help—just outright rude and dismissive.

We’ve stayed at over 20 caravan parks during our travels, and this is by far the worst customer service we’ve experienced. What made it even more disappointing was hearing from other guests that they had similar experiences with the same manager and would not return.

This place has potential, but the attitude and lack of basic customer service from management completely ruin it. We would NOT recommend staying here, absolute disgusting attitude.
Average park, very tight small sites. But close to the beach.

Check in was uncomfortable with the office staff not terribly friendly towards each other and arguing.
The amenities are great.  We had a site with ensuite which was very clean and well maintained.  The kids had plenty to do with the jumping pillow,  playground and indoor pool.
I was disappointed with the actual site size. The sites were very small and everyone was so packed in. This was just on a normal weekend out of school holidays,  I can only imagine how cramped it would be over summer.
Great stay but price increases for Easter was a bit too high

I can't say what it was like to stay here, as I paid in advance for an ensuite site, arrived at 6pm and left 10 minutes later to go elsewhere. My site was very small and cramped, covered with sand and on the edge of the road with the playground only a few metres away. The neighbour had parked their caravan in their own site and their car in my site, blocking access to the ensuite.  Everything was tight, with sites almost on top of each other; it was also very cold and windy. I went to another park a couple of minutes away which was excellent. I gave two stars because booking was easy and it wasn't their fault someone was parked in my space. But then if the sites were bigger maybe that wouldn't have happened.

Beautiful location.  Loved the surroundings and walks.   Facilities are very good.   Our only concern was the room allowance for vans over 22 feet long.   Our A frame is encroaching on the road and we have helped others try to safely manoeuvre their long vans into place, with little room to turn their vehicle.   We have seen people move their cars from the cabin car parks to help others position vans.   We realise that the average caravan has become much bigger than in the past, and understand the need rotate areas and allow lawn to recover.     It would have been nice to drive through road to road, but appreciate that power and plumbing are set up for 4 shorter rigs between each station.     The reality is that most of the vans coming in, are now longer than the allotments.         That aside, this park is very well managed, with friendly staff, and in a lovely  natural location by the Long Beach.
Excellent  place to stay.  It seemed like we were camping in the bush with all the amenities...

We came on our way through and liked it so much we stayed on the way back. Camp kitchen was fantastic, big oven, vending machine and heating. All the mod-cons you need. The playground is exceptional and the facilities are great. I would definitely recommend this place. Best paid camp on our travels. The staff are also very  helpful and accommodating! Stayed no power site
Our cabin was dirty when we booked in, a staff member did come and give it a quick clean after we complained.
Nice quiet park. Not far from town

Very rundown park that needs serious money spent on it. |We stayed in a caravan site that had power failures. This was a known issue as several staff members told us but nothing is being done to rectify this issue. Just told turn off all unnecessary power to conserve electricity! Not good enough when we were paying to stay otherwise we would have chosen to free camp somewhere else. |No sullage also which I found incredible in a park within a township and certainly not environmental. |Pool area was run down and not at all inviting. The water was cold even though it is advertised as being heated. Not enough toilet and shower cubicles for the amount of guests. Overall we would not recommend this park and would think seriously of staying in a discovery park again.

Great location just across from the beach (which you can drive onto). Just outside of town so its nice and quiet but an easy trip in to everything you need. Indoor heated pool is great for kids, and the playground is probably one of the best we've had at a Caravan park during our travels.
nice place to stay very friendly and clean close to the beach
Did not like it

Affordable and great place to stay for family oriented
Friendly staff
I love cabin room size.

No good as a caravan park, they try to cram too many vans in, no room to manouver, no space to set up awnings and spend time outside. There was a power outage when we stayed and no emergency outdoor lighting . Its bad. The beach is a walk away crossing a busy road where large trucks park. Because of the large number vans lots of kids on bikes, scooters, etc..not a good mix with lots of car movements . We won't stay here again , better park further away from the beach but more space to relax IMHO.
Power problems and no drains for grey water on power sites plus over crowding for caravans

First time visiting Robe and sure won't be the last. Great and clean amenities. Close to the beach and beautiful walking trail along the beach into town enjoying the limestone views. Friendly staff all round. Thank you 😊

Had our van.. beautiful caravan park
All the facilities are wonderful
Site are good size just make sure you let them know what size van you have
Pet friendly
We will be back in the year

Muy limpio y ordenado. El personal muy amable. La Piscina ideal para pasar el calor sin morir al sol . Cerca de la playa. Excelente wifi. La cocina muy limpia pero sin ningún utensillo. Los baños limpios y amplios. Hay un play ground para niños que esta muy bien.
Great place to stay and staff very helpful.
A little bit out of town but great staff & great campground. Clean amenities & grassy camp sites.
Very excellent park. Great sites, across the road from a great beach and a walking path into town, doesn't get much better.

Caravan sites are very small. We arrived and the pool was not open due to the pH levels.  Disappointing as we have small children who had wanted to swim. Playground is good but some more shade would be great.
Good location to the beach.

We were verbally attacked by a “park manager” called “Ken” who was a bald unc who started screaming at our kids for playing on the playground. He screamed at the kids to come down and then grabbed a 14 because he was autistic, he then grabbed them both by the arms and held them up against a metal bar. He then started walking aggressively toward our kids and chased them to were they had to get the parents to talk to him, him and his wife then completely lied about the whole thing and made some of the kids very uncomfortable and scared. He committed assault to a minor.

I sent the following email to management 3 weeks ago and as yet have had no response: We visited Robe over New Years (our 15th year visiting the park) and experienced power outages over a number of days we were there. This was very inconvenient given the heat we were experiencing at the time. We paid for an expensive powered site and should not have had to experience continual outages creating stress and wondering if the power was even going to be restored and to be told by you maintenance staff that we had to turn items in our van off as it was the cause of the problem.
We were also advised by the park staff that you are fully aware of these issues but it seems not wanting to take steps to have the issue fixed. We also know this as we experienced the same issue the previous Christmas.
We are seeking some sort of compensation as we were forced to relocate food items as we were unable to keep them in our van as well as having to suffer in the heat being unable to use any form of air-conditioning.
More disappointingly, it seems that over recent years there has been a total lack of investment by yourselves and Discovery to make improvements to the park, all the while increasing our annual site fees.
No sullage near our dry, uneven and dusty sites, when other sites have this, sub-standard toilet and shower facilities at the back of the park and apart from the camp kitchen, no other shelter or BBQ area to spend time in on when the weather is inclement.
As a branded organisation this is not acceptable.
We do enjoy coming to your park and would be pleased if you could invest more into maintaining and improving the park and its facilities.
Nice placement of the place and good view with nice rooms

Robe Holiday Park is one of those rare places that feels peaceful the moment you arrive — spacious, quiet, beautifully maintained, and run with genuine care. It’s the kind of park that makes you want to stay an extra night (or three).

First time in Robe and staying here, the sites are too small, packed in like sardines.  Three times during our 10 day stay I had to let staff know there was no soap in the female toilets at the front of the park, then the soap dispensers were broken.  Indoor pool not great, too small. And cannot believe there was no drainage on the sites, the grey water just runs under the van, never stayed at a park that doesn’t have basic drainage. Unfortunately won’t be back.

Superior cabins have no outside sitting space.
Disability toilet is a joke, shared family bathroom with no fixed rails.
Location is good, staff are great.

Powered site # 89
Clean & flat , grassed
More wider than long.
Our 6.7 length van fitted on an end site as you can put it two ways .
Cabins look lovely & some have been modernised.

You can tell from the reception staff if the park is good to be well looked afyer and the facilities clean and well maintained.  This park didn't disappoint.  Beach clseby and a heated indoor pool.  Grassed sites. Yeah.

First of I have to commend this park for sponsoring the kidney truck to which kidney patients can have dialysis while on holidays but I was not impressed with the accommodation that was surplied to be suitable for person in wheel chair we had to pay extra for a 3 room cabin because it had a ramp which was totally useless and inside the doorways would not allow a wheel chair through let alone a walker I had to go through side ways could not use the shower there was no hand rails no shower chair I had to get my wife to was me on the bed she had to get me of the toilet as well because there was no hand rails we had phoned ahead to make sure the cabin was suitable my wife end up damaging her knee so we had to leave 3 nights earlier to take her to doc and have extrays we ask for a refund but was told they don't do refunds just credit   so it wasn't an enjoyable stay and would not go back put a bad taste in my mouth arthur & maureen

Great location...across the road from the beach. Good track to walk into town 2.8 klms away with great views on the way.
Staff helpful and happy to assist
Overall was good. Just that the bed is too soft and hard to sleep. Walking distance to Long Beach and playground. Have self laundry service which is 4AUD per wash.

Large powered sites. Flat with easy turning. A little too open to the wind elements. Only one toft shower facility. Long walk in the dark as very poor lighting. Easy walk into town. Plenty of amenities.  Good fishing options.

Location is great and if you have children the play area looked great, also have an indoor pool. The condition of the toilets and showers let it down. They were old and not very clean. The men's shower block nearest to our location only had 1 working shower.

Very disappointing facilities. All the mens showers (all 3!!!) for the rear of the park were out of order and we all had to walk to the front blocks...
Again only 3 mens toilets for the middle and rear of the park.  Very inadequate.
Should be 15 mens toilets and 15 mens showers for that part of the park.
Luckily in a good location.

Rang through to park to book a caravan site.  Advised that we were travelling with friends and wanted to be next to each other. When we arrived we were opposite each other, which wasn't great.
The caravan pitches were far too close together, we couldn't even put our awning out even half way.  We were in an ensuite pitch and our neighbours were so close they couldn't even park their car on their site and they encroached onto our pitch.  They did check with us if it was ok, thankfully.  The car had to be parked in the pitch as well, which left no room for anything. We arrived mid week thankfully as the site was quite quiet.
When Friday arrived it was crazy busy, no room for the cars to park,  it was like sardines.  Not very pleasant at all.  Glad we hadn't booked to stay the weekend, as we wouldn't have stayed as long as we did.

A very strange thing happened this morning in the female showers at this caravan park
Half way through my shower I heard a male voice "Cleaner"
I assumed they would leave when they realised there was still someone in the shower

I didn't think any more of it and continued my shower
Once finished and the water was off, imagine my surprise (horror) to hear not 1 but 2 male voices in the shower block
1 male asked the other if he was nearly finished and he replied "No, there's someone using the shower"

I felt really uncomfortable and vulnerable in there with 2 unknown males (I am middle aged - imagine if this had been a younger female)

I think the caravan park should rethink their policy about males being allowed to enter the female shower blocks while still occupied
(I did check the door for cleaning times and none were noted)
We did not stay there just went and had a look.dose not look bad from the road.
Goed onderhouden camping met vriendelijk personeel

This place is so good! The staff are friendly and engaging, helpful and obviously committed to providing excellent service. The cabin we stayed in was really clean, well stocked (even the cutlery matched!!!) and although there was a constant flow of campers coming in and out of the park, it was peaceful and quiet. Great location so close to the beach, will be coming back!!!
Lovely park with great facilities. The playground is fantastic and very family focussed. Very friendly staff and Robe has some great places to visit. We will return soon.

My family and family friends loved it so much! When we arrived it is beautiful, the cabins are big and look great and the caravan sites are great, I wouldn't get a toilet block because it got sandy. Overall one of the best caravan parks.
Pool is nice and economy cabin is so cute and cozy

Nice park, staff were super friendly and helpful.

Lovely facilities, heated pool, games room, camp kitchen etc
Great location by the beach
Playground and play area was good here, including jumping pillow.
Tv, radio didn’t work , inter connectivity low. After hours staff were really friendly and helpful
Well maintained and clean.  Rooms are in great shape too.

We had our first family holiday here at Discovery Park in Robe. The first staff member reception was extremely lovely and helpful. In fact all the staff were so friendly! A special shout out to Trevor the maintenance guy, my Husband locked his keys in the car, he was more than helpful. Went above and beyond. The park was very clean and extremely well maintained. You can tell they take genuine care of the park. We got an upgrade in our cabin and again, the staff were so wonderful about it. We will be letting all our family and friends know about this park. We will be back. The kids, husband and I loved it! So much fun and entertainment for everyone. Thank you guys!
Great winter getaway, close to Beach. But a long walk to town for coffee.

Discovery Park at Robe is brilliant. Our cabin was so clean and had everything that was needed for a comfy stay. Staff were lovely, smiley and helpful. And what a location!! Beautiful Long Beach at your doorstep and not far to go to see lots of other interesting things and great shopping. Highly recommend a stay here, you will leave relaxed. Cheers
Have been here before amazing park, awsome lady in the office, beach a stone through away , amazing town , just live this place 😀 🙌 😍

We stayed for one night in a very cold July winter - heating was fantastic and warmed us right up, had all appliances/cooking utilities we would need, park was very quiet and relaxed and wonderful to be able to walk right out of the park to an ocean view. We moved onto another park to continue our travelling and we’ve wished we were back in Robe since!
Very well set up cabin for long term stay. Park is well set up for families with lots of things for kids to do. Plenty of room on the sites. Staff were friendly and helpful
Very clean and have nice playground for kids

We stayed here for 3 nights in off season and loved it. The park itself is very clean and well maintained. The facilities were great for entertaining kids! The cabin was great and was warm enough. A few jacuzzi’s would be an excellent addition and would definitely draw more customers in…

My partner and I were planning to stay on a unpowered site for 4 nights which happened to coincide with some of the wettest/ windiest weather conditions experienced in SA this year. After one night we ran into some issues leaving our tent unusable, but the team at Robe discovery park were nothing short of awesome, setting us up with a cabin for the night in response to our after hours call of desperation. Shout out to Damien for helping us out in our time of need!

We had a really good time here. From check in, the team were welcoming and friendly,went above and beyond for the kids- it was a little cold and wet for a few days so the free activity packs and craft activities were fantastic! The pool, playground and camp kitchen were fantastic, amenities clean and well kept. Thanks for a great stay, we will be back!
Very pleasant caravan park
Its a great caravan park, so much to do.
Used the campers kitchen,  very clean, with sponges and detergent for clean up and dishes. Bathrooms clean and hot water.

We spent 3 nights here. Weather wasn't too great but couldn't fault the caravan park. Debbie at the front desk was extremely helpful. Her service was exceptional compared to alot of other caravan parks we've stayed at. The 5 stars is mostly because of her.

The Campbell's.
Great park grassed sites. Clean amenities, heated pool, games room and an Adventure playground. Short walk to beach, bit longer walk to town but along scenic coastal trail.

Extremely mediocre & dated "holiday" park.
I stayed at a powered caravan site, in my caravan. The sites are crowded and packed in like sardines. Dogs are allowed at this park, so if you enjoy barking dogs at night and early in them morning - you'll love staying here. The whole park is in desperate need of a makeover. Give people more space at their caravan sites for crying out loud. No one likes taking a holiday 2 feet away from their neighbours caravan. And their barking dog, for crying out loud.
A mate of mine stayed in one of their old, very dated and run down cabins. The sliding door to the bathroom was literally falling off the roller rail. Just poor maintenance. And poor consideration of guests. Personally I won't bother again.

Too far out of town.
Free wifi is free because it doesn’t work in the cabins in the middle of the park. So if it’s free, you have no recourse.
Trees drip sap all over your car, no place to wash it off on site.
Management didn’t appear to care about any of our concerns.
Try the caravan park closer into town is our advice.
FYI, had to rewrite my review as park had my review deleted due to a technicality.   Just own the comments and try to make your park better. Simple business.
Happy with our stay. Stayed in a cabin with our dog. Nice place, right by beach. Cabin was nice, had everything we needed.
I imagine it would be awesome on warmer weather; I was just on a stopover and was impressed.

We booked an ensuite caravan site for 5 nights over the Easter period for the family for $100 per night. We thought an ensuite would guarantee us a premium van spot and we were mistaken.

Pros: plenty of kids activities (awesome playground, games room, indoor pool), great location and good staff

Cons: these are notable. Sites are TINY and you are literally packed in like sardines. Our ensuite site was particularly terrible void of grass. When it rained it turns into a mud pit. You also cannot fit your caravan, fully erect the awning and also park your car on the same site!!!! It took us two days until we asked for and got an overflow parking space we could fully erect the awning. The state of site was made so clear to us since our next stop in our journey had amazing grass covered sites. Unfortunately, we won't be back.

We arrived to find exactly what all the reviews were saying. The powered sites are way too small! Each caravan touching eachother and some caravan tow balls hanging over the road. Not acceptable making the sites so small. This wasn’t even the worst of it!
We were receiving text messages all day about kids riding with helmets on and watch speed limits etc, yet they DID NOT send a text out warning all the poor travellers of the incoming overnight storm and 65km
Hour winds! Our caravan awning almost got ripped off our van, and there were several poor people packing their tents and leaving at 2am with their babies! This is not acceptable and you have a duty of care to warn travellers of incoming storms. Instead of texting about food trucks, send out a message to warn travellers to batten down! We left three days early we were so disappointed. The night of the storm on our ensuite site the walling of the ensuite was flapping so loud it almost blew off. A total disappointment for an Easter trip booked so early in advance.
We travelled to Naracoorte Big 4 after this horrific time and it totally turned our trip around. Fantastic caravan park with LARGE lush grass sites!!

Do yourself a favour and do not stay here!!! $70 a night for dirt and a storm.

We stayed at discovery park for 5 nights. No issues at all we were in a powered caravan site. We have a big caravan was abit worried at the start if our caravan will fit but fit perfectly. Kids were on their bikes the whole time loved this caravan park definitely will be back.
Great

Well apparently 2pm check is not the case. It's when the two arrogant, rude and useless  people on the desk say so. Couldn't be more disappointed with the service at the desk. Remarkable. And the caravans are jammed in like sardines. Will be be returning to Robe but not to this disappointing establishment.

We stayed here with our caravan 3 weeks ago. Whilst the park looks good, maintened and the staff were friendly. The size of the caravan sites are so small, and you are litterally crammed in right next door to your neighbours, on all sides. We could barely open our side windows. The back of the caravan was at the post and the front hitch was just touching the road. This was despite providing the size of our caravan when booking. Our neighbours were inconsiderate with their loud tv, and as they were on the end of the row, they had their (much smaller) caravan sideways, which meant they were even closer to ours. There were so many empty spaces near the entrance to the caravan park, in fact rows and rows of empty spaces, yet we were all crammed in like sardines. The photo's show the view from our windows. We will not be staying here again. Do not recommend.
Eine ganz tolle Anlage in Robe. Vom Campen bis zu tollen kleinen Häuschen mit Bad, Dusche, voll ausgestatteter Küche vorhanden. Das Beste war die Wärmelampe im Bad, die fand ich klasse.

Was a great park kids loved it the play area was amazing kids didn't stop and close to the beach! Only down fall was the wind but you can not help this.

Was a lovely place

Only 3 nights here, but we'll be back foreshore😊🙂
Well kept grounds, quiet, good facilities 👍

First impressions were great. Super beachfront location, friendly reception staff, beautiful new cabins on the beachfront, lots of empty grassy sites at the front of the park. But as we drove to the back of the park where our site was my heart sank….caravans on postage stamp sized sites, absolutely on top of one another, more dirt than grass, no slabs, ugly donga style amenities block. It was honestly depressing. We gave our caravan size on booking so there’s no excuse for putting us or anyone else on a ludicrously tiny sites. We had to ask two car owners to please move their cars off the road just to enter the narrow road our site was on!
It was physically impossible to get our awning out if we were to adhere to the strict no parking of cars on the road policy so we had to park next to our caravan. There was no space for parking in front of it. I am SO thankful we had only booked for 2 nights. Why everyone was squashed like sardines right at the back on what surely must be tent sites is beyond me when the front of the park with the larger grassy caravan sites was relatively empty. Grass rejuvenation measures possibly?
There was also strangely no grey water drains and we shared one tap with the site behind us but there were no fittings.
Very disappointing. We won’t be back.

It was very busy  we had a caravan park with a ensuite  parks were so tight especially when the person opposite  parks on the road  making  if very difficult  for arriving guests to get past  then he spills petrol  all over the road  with out cleaning it up  and no consequences  we left early  and won't be returning
Excellent Caravan Park, we had friends stay in Cabins & they were excellent too

Great few days in a 2 bedroom cabin!  Everything you could want, good bed, good shower, even though the pressure was a bit dicey sometimes.  Great quality crockery etc
Will be back!
Brilliant place. Extremely accomidating park. What a spot. Must see and treat yourself to the beach side deluxe cabin

Very poor experience here. The sites are too small. Caravans or large tent set ups do not fit.

Park staff could not care less if other park users are blaring their very loud annoying tv shows outside on a massive projector past 11pm at night right next to your tent.

Park staff were unable to come to a resolution to satisfy us and made us spend three hours of our holiday packing down our tent and setting it up elsewhere (without their help) instead of speaking to or moving the highly rude and disrespectful partying guests.

Will never stay at discovery parks again. We are nice and tolerant people and gentle chatting or quiet music is ok but extremely loud TV past 11pm is not acceptable and is against the parks apparent guidelines, that they clearly don’t even care about. Never received any apologies or compensation for our holiday being severely impacted by rude guests or uncaring staff.
Lovely clean amenities and very close to lovely beach.  The only fault we had was the sites were very very tight.

We were a group of 6 adults staying in three deluxe waterfront cabins.  The cabins themselves were lovely - well-appointed, clean and spacious - with large balconies fronting the road and parking area.  Be aware that “waterfront” does not mean “water view”, unless you scramble onto the roof.  That disappointment was added to by the lack of beach access at the northern end of the park where we were (there’s a low-ish brick wall in front of the cabins, but my vaulting days are well and truly over), meaning that we had to use the main entrance to visit the beach.  We all had trouble with the WiFi - intermittent at best.  We liked the park’s location, about 2 and a half kilometres from town and very quiet.  Highly recommend the Robe Coastal Trail, which starts just south of the park and will be a 12-kilometre loop when finished.

Great location right across from Longbeach.  Indoor pool on site (we didn’t use it) great camp kitchen and clean ablutions.  located about 2km from town.    4WD access to the Longbeach about 200m south of the park entrance.
Sites near the ensuites are extremely tight if they are all occupied leading to having to park on the narrow road.   Sites are dusty in this area, but staff are constantly watering.   Other areas are grassed.
Make sure you visit the local brewery (in the industrial area of town) as well as the Sky Seafood also supplying great fish and chips (better than what’s offered in the Main Street).  The Sky Seafood will clean and cut any cray you choose and combine it with prawns and oysters for a sensational feed
made me pay for a out of date chocolate

Beach is right across the street
Foodtrucks and coffee available on site
Clean amenities
Plenty of play area for the kids
Pet friendly
Indoor pool
Games room
Excellent value, will gladly return

Absolutely epic stay with great grass site. Lots of food vans at entry as well for pizza in the evening or coffee in the mornings. Really enjoyed our brief stay here. One road in and out of town so you can guarantee on the weekend you’ll have to blow through a breathalyser by the local cops. Good to see they are looking after the community and the police had great banter with the kids. Short walk to the beach and playground nearby. Great ammenities. Dog and kid friendly

Awesome caravan park. We stayed on a powered site with a motorhome generous space. 13x13. Park was children safe. Customer service was great. Kids loved the buggy hire. Park is 5 min walk to beach. There was coffee van, chicken van pizza van and waffle van’s during our stay. Only downside was kids games room half the machines were out of order.

I’m honestly aghast at the rating of 4.3 for this caravan park. It’s easily the worst park I’ve ever stayed in. I rarely write negative reviews preferring to always err on the positive, however I’ll make an exception in this case.

We had booked our site with family 7 months ago, specifically asking to be together. When we got here we found that we were as far from each other as we could be.

Not besides the sites are the size of a postage stamp that almost no body can fit their caravans on. The explanation we were told that it’s in the fine print that they won’t guarantee sites. The staff were rude and unhelpful. Our children shattered not to spend time with their cousins.

We spoke to many visitors here, everyone says they same. Excessively small sites, rude service… if you are looking for a fair dinkum park and not one where you can hear your neighbour snoring or braking wind, I suggest you look at one of the other 2 parks.

It’s totally disgraceful, if I had somewhere else to go, I would but being peak season robe is booked out. I’ll suffer one more night and then look forward to putting this place behind me.

You have been warned.

Absolutely loved our stay here. The staff were amazing and very friendly and helpful. The location of the park was fantastic right near the beach but also close to town. The indoor pool and playground was great for the kids. The waffle stick van at the front was a great addition and had amazing daily coffee and waffles. Would highly recommend this caravan park.
Location wise its very close to the front beach. The suite is small but clean. Wifi is supplied free but coverage can be hit and miss. Otherwise it is a pleasant place to stay.
Nice caravan park right on the beach.
Very clean and well set up for a variety of travellers, including camper vans, tenters, caravaners and cabins.
Excelente como siempre! Gracias!

Would recommend this caravan park to anyone. Ideal location and clean adequate facilities. Bonuses were inside pool, great playground and pancakes Saturday morning. Complaints were only shower cubicles near camp kitchen little on the small side and camp kitchen internal lights stayed on 24/7 so shone on my tent all night. Would definitely return
First time there ,spacious, clean and tidy cabin ,friendly service ,good amenities and the beach is right across the road

Have stayed twice now,! In an economy cabin this time as didnt have the bigger kids and it was perfect size with all amenities!
My daughter loved the pool, activities room and playground
Rooms have everything you need which is so helpful!
So close to the beach and such a friendly environment! Will be back again 🫶🏻
Loved our time in this Discovery Park. Nice location, and I wish we had more time there.

Absolutely disgraceful we booked this caravan park in February for a holiday this Christmas period.  We received a call today 22/11/24 to advise that our vans were too big for their sites and our bookings would be cancelled.  I read a review on Facebook about some other people that booked in April and were advised in September that their bookings were cancelled due to their vans being too big as well.  Hopefully they were able to book elsewhere, we have no hope.  I tried phoning their head office left a message and no return call.  Merry Christmas discovery parks.
Zu teuer, Zimmer war nicht sauber .

Amazing location across from the beach, nice clean cabins with all the necessities, good playground with jumping pillow, amenities were all kept very clean and our favourite part was the indoor heated pool with a deep side and a shallow side perfect for my 2 year old to have the time of her life in. Staff were lovely also, cannot fault and will stay here again!

Pre booked, 2 night ensuite site as discovery parks had a % off sale which made it excellent value. 2 adults.
Corner site was spacious, ensuite clean and relatively modern. Not so good was the very loud auto exhaust fan and a very bright night light on the access veranda.  The park has great lawn areas for many sites, grounds are well kept, basic amenities including laundry, only 2 machines and 1 dryer plus hills hoist.
Park is walking distance to the beach and a huge playground/ bbq area across the road. Easy drive into town which offers plenty of choice for dining, take away, seafood and groceries. The coastline is spectacular, lighthouse and old Obelisk, jetty and walking trails are a must.
Staff are lovely and it’s a great place to stay if you are travelling in the area.

Stayed one night at the ensuite power site.
Staff was friendly,  the park was really nice, it has the best playground I have ever seen.
Our ensuite power site was really nice.
Definitely will go back
Little out of town. Could not fault the service or the facilities on offer. Beach close by.

Nice clean facilities. Great spacious playground with a bouncy pillow. Friendly staff that occasionally sweep the area. The pool is a decent size but pretty slippery. Its a nice location as well as it’s next to a beach. I recommend this place if you want a nice play to stay at Robe.

Overall a decent park but not the same standard of a lot of the other Discovery Parks we have stayed at. Good location, with the beach across the road.
The powered sites are grassy but extremely small, our van isn't overly large but it was still a tight fit. Noticed a lot of others struggled to fit as well.
The bathrooms are ok with plenty of showers and toilets but could do with a facelift.
Fantastic playground and lots of grass for games. Good roads for bikes and scooters.
Unfortunately the let down for us was the staff and the state of the pool. Upon check in we were given no extra information on the happenings in the park (only found out about the pancake breakfast after the fact) or the local area, which we are used to. One of the groundsmen was extremely rude on multiple occasions, yelling at kids and adults alike. The pool really needs a good clean, although they appear to keep up with the chemical care and checking it regularly, there were lots of bits floating in the water and it was very murky. The kids refused to go back in after the first time.

With a bit of extra care this could be a great park. Unfortunately for us, it doesn't meet the usual Discovery Parks standards.
Great park, great facilities. The only thing that was disappointing was the staff member with the white beard that walked around abusing kids and making inappropriate remarks to adults in the park.

Nice place with friendly staff.
But the caravan sites are very small and it's very difficult to manoeuvre your caravan in.
All the people we spoke to said the same.
Caravan sites are small

This caravan park is in a great location on the edge of Robe.  We were there with friends from our caravan group.  Unfortunately the biggest problem we had was the weather. It was appalling. The park has plenty to keep visitors occupied including a fairly large indoor heated pool and a medium sized well presented Camp kitchen and decent kids play ground.
Had a powered site. Was a lovely park to stay in. All amenities were great,friendly  people. But the weather didn't  want to be nice for us.
Best place for get away

We stayed here 2 nights in our van once  arriving the ladies were lovely at the office. They gave us ample information and suggested suitable places to eat .
The over all  sight of the park is very clean and well maintained. Modern flooring on the bathroom floors.  Only one suggestion here a shower caddy would be handy in the showers similar to others we visited instead of putting accessories on the floor or side seat. The grounds had all camping 🏕 ammentities that you would ask for. Out door kitchens for bbqs and waste service bin throughout  the grounds. The laundry facilities are nice and clean. Ensure you have real money, not card money, to exchange coins for machines as We just had one $ 20 dollar note to exchange for coins. The beach is in walking distance to the park. Across the road from the park there are swings and play equipment for kids. It is a pet friendly park. Has wifi to conect to once your settledI would come back again to this park. It is a 5 min drive into Robes main street shops and information centre.
Good to be greeted with a smile. Helpful staff. Sites are very spacious. Amenities very clean. Lots of activities for kids and beach across the road.
Great Park,  highly recommend 👌 👏 👍
Great location, staff and service budget friendly. Simple clean rooms perfect for families. Stayed years ago still good value.

Beautiful Accommodation
Comfortable Clean & Tidy
Quiet area, close to the Beach
Watch the waves roll onto the shore from the first floor.
Relax and enjoy the peace on the lower (ground) floor.
Enjoyed our stay. Cabin very comfortable. Great bed. The park is in the quiet end of town, with beautiful walking areas. Definitely return.

We very rarely stay at parks as our kids are feral and we like privacy for that reason haha||But this place has completely changed our view, staff were amazing and so friendly, they put on so much fun stuff for the kids too, pancakes on the weekends, they hide a lobster in the park for the kids to find, cfs put on a big fire on the Saturday night, quiz for the adults to win wine, ||It was going to be a dad and kids weekend, my wife and eldest daughter decided to tag along; went in to pay the extra on arrival and the manager said don’t worry about it, then we decided to stay an extra night and they charged it out at half price, ||On top of the park robe is a lovely town with lovely people and so so much to do, we did a heap of fishing, 4wding, exploring near by towns, pub meals, we will definitely be returning soon Thankyou so much Robe discovery park

Extremely helpful staff.
Cabins on frontage provided quick access to the beach. Located north of town, so was very quiet & relaxing. All amenities available.

Nice caravan park Nice and clean
Great caravan park for kids

Would not recommend. If i could give it less than 1 star i would. The cabin was extremely old and run down although clean. The bed you sank in amd rolled to the middle made sleeping impossible and had a very sore back.
Definitely wont be back

Schlicht und in die Jahre gekommen, aber immerhin alles sauber gewesen.

Bedauerlicherweise war das WiFi von der Geschwindigkeit und Verfügbarkeit das mit Abstand schlechteste Netz, was uns in 2 Wochen in Australien in mehreren Domizilen zur Verfügung stand.

autiful park. highlights: one of the few caravan parks that has good green grass well maintained so pegs can go in nicely with our tent. excellent and clean facilities which decent sized sites right next to the beach. nice swimming pool. really good clean camp kitchen.

only feedback: if the park allowed fires espeacially on those cold nights i would have given this place 10/10

but overall excellent park would come back again.

Stayed here for a couple nights, great place for kids with the pillow and play ground.

Only thing I'd suggest is if you have a caravan larger than 20ft including drawbar, I'd make it clear when making your booking. Arrived and our can didn't fit on the site and moved twice before been given a site that fit the van.

We stayed in cabin IV 6, it was super clean, had everything u needed, and mattres was one of the comfiest beds iv sleeped on in a caravan park, staff where very friendly. The caravan park its self was great for the kids and a 2 min walk to the beach. Definitely be going back
Quiet peaceful Park located right opposite the beach. Beautiful
Great park! Be mindful of booking the economy cabin (no ensuite) that carport space is very tight. You will need to be able to reverse into the space otherwise you will be unable to open your door!
Gorgeous caravan park with plenty of sites and cabin options available. Heaps for the kids to do. Deluxe cabin was clean and well presented. Would definitely stay again

Service from the team here was great. Kids loved the massive playground, pool and games room. Heaps of families on site so despite the weather being miserable the kids had a great time playing with the neighbours
Nice clean park, here at end of April, hate to be here peak season, have to line up for showers, even now have to watch for someone to come out.

A good, clean basic cabin. Comfy beds and everything we needed. Close to the beach and a great walking track into town.|However, I am not a fan of dogs in caravan parks and there were plenty. Not so bad if they are kept on a lead, but in this park they roamed  (and left their droppings) freely.

We have stayed on an ensuite site for a couple of days.

The park is fairly good overall with great facilities with the camp kitchens pool and play areas for the kids. The ensuite on the site was impeccable. Beach access is quite easy with an easy stroll out the front gate.

My biggest gripe is the size of the sites. Even with smaller camper trailers and caravans most of the site is taken up.

We have a decent sized van, and struggled to get it on the site with it only just fitting, our awning would have been protruding into the next site.

This looks to be a problem across the whole park with normal powered sites quite small as well, there does seem to be a limited amount of bigger sites down on the back fence though

Ensuite lovely
caravan site had no grass we were  in a sand pit our friends had the same problem.
Plenty of things for the kids to do
Stayed 3 nights in a Deluxe 2 bedroom waterfront cabin. Can sleep 6. Very spacious and clean. Balcony with outdoor setting. Directly opposite Long Beach. Really nice. Would stay here again.

Great location, staff are lovely, amenities are great!
Definitely glad we extended our stay!
Thanks for having us!!!
Friendly service always. Powered site. Clean ammenaties

The staff were very friendly and accommodating |The park is really well kept and the amenities spotless|We will definitely return to your park|We love the location and ease of access|The pool was lovely and have I mentioned how fabulous the staff were
loved it. great staff. great place for kids. great location.

Stayed in our caravan here. Very clean , quiet and the staff were very friendly and helpful. Lots of activities to be had here, including beach driving and sand dune driving, incredible coast line .The shops in Robe are fabulous, great micro brewery .
Awesome Discovery Park highly recommend staying here with excellent customer service, family oriented will be going back again.

Awesome location, reasonable pricing, one of the few parks where amenities are cleaned twice daily so everything is always neat and tidy even in peak periods! This is so far by far and away the best discovery/gday parks location we have stayed in and we have been to quite a few ☺️ would definitely come
Back.
Great facilities for the whole family
Such a Great Location and Marvellous Staff, Amma is very Kind and Welcoming… i Highly Recommend this Discovery Park for all Families and individuals who loves camping…

Lovely cabin, across the road from the Long Beach. Could park beside the cabin for convenience. Cabin very clean, along with the gardens and pool of the park.
Only disappointing things are that no bins are provided for recycling of plastic containers and glass (e.g., glass jars, etc.), and no washing line in bathroom or across balcony, nor a clothes horse provided for wet towels and clothing. Washing lines are provided within the park, but were not in-view for the cabin. Would be nice if pool noodles and other 'toys' were available for hire for the pool too.
War alles besten für den Preis.

This was a pleasant park which we chose because of our G'day membership.  The location to the beach was great - just walk across the road and you're there.  The park itself was very basic but the amenities were just fine and there's a playground and indoor pool which during our stay were well used by little children, even though it wasn't school holidays in any state.

The powered sites were wide wide enough but it was really just a flat piece of grass in 3 rows down the middle of the park.  The layout could do with a little updating like some hedges or shade/privacy between sites.  I would not like to be there on a hot day.  I think the days of just lining us up like a carpark are gone and powered sites these days need a bit of sprucing up.  Especially considering we pay anywhere from $30 to $100 for a piece of dirt and a small electricity cost to run a fridge and lights.

Come on Discovery/G'day parks - plant some hedges or change the layout to make it more appealing and more relaxing.  Other parks are doing this and time and again, they're getting business away from the carpark variety of powered sites.

Sites are very tight, but the staff try and work around it.  Was snapped at by one of the young workers as our vehicle wasn't on our site.  It would not physically fit.  Acting manager came to find us and sorted the issue for several of us that had the same problem.  Lovely lady.
My best staff member award goes to the lovely man that cleaned the camp kitchen.  He was professional,  friendly and did an amazing job.  The kitchen was clean when he went in and absolutely sparkled when he left.
Spotlessly clean, roomy, comfortable cabin with everything you might need, plus great location. Heated indoor pool a big plus. One of the nicest, if not THE nicest cabin I've stayed in👍👍👍

Fantastic location. Wide choice of accommodation styles. Pet-friendly options. Reasonably priced. Super clean and well managed. Lots of amenities. Not sure what else is needed for a short stay or an extended holiday… Our second time here, and we’ll be back!
Thank you.

Reception closes early on some days.
Sites large .Facilities good.

We paid a premium price for a "deluxe waterfront cabin" it was neither deluxe nor waterfront ( there was no water views as there is a band of thick bush in front of the beach, with a public road running right past the cabin's verandah) the bathroom was very small even though it was a two bedroom cabin! Never again!

I spent a week here with my dog in an ensuite cabin in October 2023. Great park, excellent facilities and very dog friendly. The beach is across the road. The guy watering the garden washed my feet off on the way back from the beach and the cleaning/service staff were very helpful when I couldn’t start the stove. Best of all was after I inadvertently left my JBL speaker behind, I received a phone call to tell me I had left it and the cleaning staff had handed it to the office. I absolutely respect such honesty. I sent a post bag for its return and received it back within a week. So impressed overall, what a lovely experience. I just wish I lived a bit closer so I could get there quicker and more often. Thank you Discovery Park Robe, I am truly grateful for your hospitality 🙏🏻

I found the front desk speaking to whoever it was though the front desk in the week a little rude especially when we were trying to tell them something and my partner was concerned about me getting there and he has a mental health issue and was feeling anxious, but other than that the cabin was prepared lovely by Angela and we enjoyed staying there very much.
Loved this park . Customer service first class  Amenities spotless
Well positioned Caravan  Park with short walking distance to beach, town and  wonderful natural bush.
Great place to stay
Staff were very accommodating, park was quiet, so they gave us a double site, very close to the amenities. Great walks out the front, a very comfortable park.

Disappointing customer service, we called left messages but know one called us back to assist. TV was not tuned in so no TV for over 2hrs, we worked it out in the end. Couldnt get stove / grill to light, park handyman came & opened top cupboard to get lighter. Why wasnt it left in drawer? Cupboards are way to high, we found it difficult to reach items.
The park needs to try harder to improve their services !!
Great place right next to the beach to watch the sunset, excellent WiFi and amenities
Front of van park very good neat and tidy, rear section needs more care and mowing, a lot of rubbish in garden bedd

We were told at the time of booking that we could have a fireplace for cooking, only to find out when we got there that we couldn't. Now stuck with thawed out meat and no way of cooking it. Not happy is an understatement, not too mention a waste of meat and now having to purchase another meal.

For the price this place has it all. Great indoor heated pool, lovely games room with even a free arcade game and also a great outdoor play area. We have a great stay here and can only recommend this place. Thanks

Family holiday, extremely missed matched place amenities…… not many rubbish bins around, cabins are clean, but run down.

When you walk in to get the keys, there is no friendliness just all the matter fact, tried to make a conversation and joke with them to be cut off, could say it was a bad day, but I was treated the same when I left!…. i’m suggesting the ladies have PR training…..warm welcoming smiles go a long way!

Definitely not a warm environment!

When I go back to the park, NEVER!
The park is compact and with ample playgrounds for the kids, the cabins are very nice, modern and very clean. On the outskirts of the town so a couple KMs to main St but not a big deal.
Extra good site with an ensuite.
Just what can we say, but just perfect for what we wanted to do.

We stayed in a most comfortable delux cabin. It had all been clean and prepared for us. There was everything you needed in the kiichen for cookung any meals, plus plenty of cutlery . The cleanbathroom was fitted with many clean towels plus heating and fans. The beds were very comfortable. There was more than enough cupboard space for our clothes. Heating was just right for this colder month,  Highly recommended
Great spot for a couple of days

Stayed in 2 bedroom cabin early August, just a handful of people camping, location good and close to shops. However this time of year most of shops are closed, even the camel farm was closed which is what I was looking forward to the most. I loved the cabin, very, very comfy beds and so quiet at night, even though I was on end side of park, I could still hear waves. WiFi not good in area nor is there reception.
Perfec! Best price in Robe, indoor pool, beach. Restaurant list included. I drove over from WA and this is the new number 1

Just an overnight stay on a bigger journey, we got upgraded to bigger and nicer cabin then previous booked which was a bonus on our trip....staff were great and kids loved the playground and  heated pool. Will definitely be back with friends and longer staff....great location to beach for 4wd driving
Stayed in a powered sites a while ago. Great spot and convenient to the beach.
Comfortable and good amenities.
We had a great time here.  Rooms were very clean and super close to the beach.  Kids had fun at the park and pools.  We'd stay again
Very nice caravan park
Nice tidy park, excellent facilities

Terrible Service, my daughter was hospitalised and I had a medical certificate and they refused to refund , also didn't accept my offical medical certificate. Rubbish service ! Manager doesn't even respond to emails . No compassion

Great caravan park.
Very clean and tidy.
Spotless amenities
